close_reason: Added :now option to Item.new/4 and Item.leased?/2
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/item.ex`

## Current Code (lines 88-89)
```elixir
def leased?(%__MODULE__{lease_expires_at: exp}) when not is_nil(exp) do
  System.system_time(:millisecond) < exp
end
```

## Required Changes
Add optional `now` parameter:
```elixir
@spec leased?(t()) :: boolean()
@spec leased?(t(), non_neg_integer()) :: boolean()
def leased?(item, now \\ System.system_time(:millisecond))

def leased?(%__MODULE__{lease_id: nil}, _now), do: false

def leased?(%__MODULE__{lease_expires_at: exp}, now) when not is_nil(exp) do
  now < exp
end

def leased?(_, _now), do: false
```

## Notes
- `Item.new/4` already accepts `:vesting_time` in opts, which is the pattern to follow
- `Item.visible?/2` already has `:now` injection - keep consistent
title: Add :now injection to Item.leased?/1
